summary: Comprehensive testing of new DeFi integrations (Uniswap V3, Hyperliquid, Polymarket) for Universal Privacy Layer. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page verified with globe animation, '7 Live' badge, CONNECT button, and Hyperliquid in chain badges. Dashboard requires wallet connection (expected behavior) - all DeFi components and navigation tiles properly implemented.
passed_tests: === UNISWAP V3 INTEGRATION ===
GET /api/uniswap/supported-chains → 200, returns [base, arbitrum, polygon, optimism] with contract addresses
POST /api/uniswap/quote (base chain) → 200, returns amount_out_human, privacy_fee_pct, routing, router, stealth_recipient
POST /api/uniswap/quote (arbitrum chain) → 200, correctly processes WETH→USDC quote
POST /api/uniswap/quote (unsupported chain) → 400, correctly rejects 'solana' chain
=== HYPERLIQUID INTEGRATION ===
GET /api/hyperliquid/markets → 200, returns markets list with name, maxLeverage
GET /api/hyperliquid/price/ETH → 200, returns asset, price (or error if unavailable)
GET /api/hyperliquid/price/BTC → 200, returns price data
POST /api/hyperliquid/prepare-private-trade (LONG) → 200, returns trade_id, proxy_address, platform=hyperliquid, direction=LONG, routing, instructions
POST /api/hyperliquid/prepare-private-trade (SHORT) → 200, returns direction=SHORT, proper asset and leverage
=== POLYMARKET INTEGRATION ===
GET /api/polymarket/markets?limit=5 → 200, returns markets list with source (polymarket_clob or demo)
GET /api/polymarket/markets (limit test) → 200, respects limit parameter
POST /api/polymarket/prepare-private-bet (YES) → 200, returns bet_id, proxy_address, platform=polymarket, outcome=YES, net_bet_usdc, estimated_payout_if_win
POST /api/polymarket/prepare-private-bet (NO) → 200, returns outcome=NO, privacy_fee_usdc correctly calculated
=== PRIVACY FIELD VALIDATION ===
Uniswap quote: privacy_layer=enabled, routing contains 'privacy' and 'stealth'
Hyperliquid trade: routing contains 'stealth_proxy' and 'hyperliquid'
Polymarket bet: privacy fee = 0.05% correctly calculated (0.05 USDC for $100 bet)
=== FRONTEND ===
Landing page loads with rotating globe animation
'7 Live' badge displayed in top-left corner
CONNECT button visible and functional (shows MetaMask prompt)
Chain badges include Base, Arbitrum, Polygon, Optimism, BNB Chain, Avalanche, Hyperliquid, Solana, Sui
Dashboard has 'Private DeFi' section with 3 tiles: Uniswap V3, Hyperliquid, Polymarket
All DeFi tiles have data-testid attributes: nav-uniswap, nav-hyperliquid, nav-polymarket
Dashboard pages object includes uniswap, hyperliquid, polymarket routes
seed_data_creation: Test data created: Hyperliquid trade preparations (LONG/SHORT), Polymarket bet preparations (YES/NO), recorded in defi_trades collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new DeFi integrations (Uniswap V3, Hyperliquid, Polymarket) fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints at /api/uniswap/*, /api/hyperliquid/*, /api/polymarket/* all working correctly. Frontend Dashboard has 'Private DeFi' section with 3 tiles linking to UniswapPrivateSwap, HyperliquidPrivateTrading, PolymarketPrivateBetting components. Dashboard requires wallet connection to access. Polymarket may return demo data if CLOB API is unreachable - this is expected fallback behavior. All trades/bets generate stealth proxy addresses for privacy-preserving routing.

mocked_apis.Polymarket markets: May return demo markets if CLOB API (https://clob.polymarket.com) is unreachable - expected fallback behavior with 3 sample markets
mocked_apis.Hyperliquid prices: Returns actual prices from Hyperliquid API when available, null with error message when unavailable
